data.name: GradientSkiaTextBrushRelativePoint_RelativeValueOutOfRange
data.value: When RelativeUnit is Relative, the value must be within [0, 1].

data.name: TextEditor_EnterEditMode_NotEditable
data.value: The current text editor is not editable. IsEditable=false, so edit mode cannot be entered.

data.name: TextEditor_Platform_SizeToContentWidthRequiresFixedHeight
data.value: Width size-to-content requires a fixed height. {0}

data.name: TextEditor_Platform_SizeToContentHeightRequiresFixedWidth
data.value: Height size-to-content requires a fixed width. {0}

data.name: TextEditor_Platform_SizeToContentManualRequiresFiniteSize
data.value: When SizeToContent is TextSizeToContent.Manual, Width and Height cannot both be unconstrained inside an infinite-size container. {0}

data.name: TextEditorDecoration_GetDecorationLocationRecommendedBounds_VerticalNotSupported
data.value: Text decorations for vertical layout are not supported yet.

data.name: TextEditorDecoration_GetDecorationLocationRecommendedBounds_LocationNotSupported
data.value: The requested decoration location is not supported.

data.name: TextEditorImmutableDecorationCollection_IndexMustBeNonNegative
data.value: The index cannot be less than 0.

data.name: RenderManagerExtension_CharDataNotInLine
data.value: The provided CharData does not belong to the current LineDrawingArgument and cannot be used to get handwriting-paper information.

data.name: RenderManagerExtension_MultipleRunPropertiesRequireCharData
data.value: The line contains multiple run properties. Pass CharData to specify which run property should be used.

data.name: SkiaCharInfoMeasurer_CurrentCharStillInvalidAfterMeasure
data.value: The current character must have valid size information after measurement.

data.name: SkiaTextEditor_DebugReRenderOnlyInDebugMode
data.value: Method {0} can be called only when debug mode is enabled.

data.name: SkiaTextEditor_PlatformProviderAlreadyBound
data.value: Each SkiaTextEditorPlatformProvider can be associated with only one SkiaTextEditor. Reusing one across editors is not supported. The current provider is already bound to a text editor whose DebugName is {0}.
